title: Teen Bead Builder
description: A Montessori-inspired teen board game where kids combine a ten bar, unit beads, and a numeral card.
learningGoals: See teen numbers as ten plus extra ones
Connect golden bead quantities with teen numerals
Hear teen number names after building each quantity
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap ten bar, unit beads, and numeral card onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct pieces pop, sparkle, and speak their role; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds speak the ten-plus-ones sentence.

modes.title: Build a Teen
modes.skill: teen numbers as ten plus ones

credits: Kaigani; placeholder emoji bead and text card art rendered by the shared build-assemble engine. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
